caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK." The setting appears to be a casual, possibly personal studio space, decorated with numerous framed photographs on the wall behind him. To his right, there is a mannequin dressed in a white shirt and a display of clothing racks, suggesting that the location might also serve as a retail store. The man seems engaged in conversation, smiling and looking slightly to his left, indicating interaction with someone off-camera. The overall atmosphere is relaxed and informal, typical of a conversational podcast format.
